pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 55: create_doc_if_missing creates workspace with this path via Nuxeo REST API
setup_task.sh lines 135-142: Ground truth file created with correct_uid, wrong_uid, correct_doc_name, and random_seed

privileged_info_summary: The task is set up in a Nuxeo workspace at '/default-domain/workspaces/Campaign-Assets' containing two synthetic image documents: 'Candidate-Alpha' and 'Candidate-Beta'. One document contains a red 'APPROVED' stamp while the other shows grey 'DRAFT v1' text. The documents are randomly assigned which image they receive (50/50 chance). The agent must visually inspect both documents, identify which has the APPROVED stamp, and rename only that document to 'Final-Banner'. Ground truth data is stored in '/tmp/ground_truth.json' recording which document is correct and which is wrong, enabling post-task verification via the Nuxeo REST API.
